---
title: Captain Lyra Vale
section: NPCs
type: npc
summary: Captain Lyra Vale keeps the harbor watch disciplined without losing sight of the people under her care.
image: npcs/captain-lyra-vale.png
image_alt: Portrait of Captain Lyra Vale.
image_caption: Harbor watch captain and trusted ally of the crew.

Captain Lyra Vale coordinates inspections on Harbor Row and quietly feeds the crew jobs that keep the docks stable.
